title: Pin/test Python client dependency ranges for TUI and dashboard
description: Discovered during project-LICHEN-py4c.1.3 architecture review. python/pyproject.toml uses broad lower bounds such as textual>=0.80.0, starlette>=0.35, and aiocoap>=0.4.7 while the current lock resolves much newer packages. aiocoap transport code also uses private aiocoap internals, and the dashboard loads HTMX from an unpinned CDN. Establish tested dependency ranges or pins for Textual/Rich, aiocoap, Starlette, and HTMX/offline dashboard behavior; update uv.lock and CI checks. No hardware required.
